name: exa-search
description: Semantic search, similar content discovery, and structured research using Exa API
capabilities: Perform semantic search using AI embeddings to find conceptually similar content
Discover related documents and resources based on meaning rather than keywords
Search structured data categories including companies, people, and research papers
Integrate Exa API functionality directly into Claude Code conversations
Enable natural language queries for complex research tasks
author: sickn33
securitySummary: Static analysis flagged external_commands and network patterns, but all findings are false positives. The external_commands pattern is a standard npx package installation command. The network pattern is a documentation link to GitHub, not actual network code. No cryptographic code exists in the file. This is a documentation-only skill for Exa API integration.
valueStatement: Finding relevant information online is time-consuming with traditional keyword search. This skill enables semantic search using AI embeddings to discover similar content and conduct structured research through the Exa API.
limitations: Requires a valid Exa API key to function
Search results depend on Exa API index coverage and freshness
Rate limits apply based on your Exa API subscription tier
Cannot access private or authenticated web content

useCases.title: Academic Research Discovery
useCases.description: Find relevant research papers and academic resources by searching for concepts rather than exact keywords.

useCases.title: Competitive Intelligence
useCases.description: Discover company information and market data using structured category searches.

useCases.title: Content Research
useCases.description: Find similar articles and resources to expand knowledge on a specific topic.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Semantic Search
promptTemplates.prompt: Search for content about [topic] using semantic search to find the most relevant results.

promptTemplates.title: Similar Content Discovery
promptTemplates.prompt: Find content similar to [URL or document] using embedding-based similarity search.

promptTemplates.title: Structured Category Search
promptTemplates.prompt: Search for [type: companies/people/papers] related to [topic] using Exa category filtering.

promptTemplates.title: Complex Research Query
promptTemplates.prompt: Conduct structured research on [topic] by performing semantic search, filtering by [criteria], and organizing results by [relevance/date/category].

bestPractices: Configure your Exa API key as an environment variable for secure access
Use specific and descriptive queries to improve semantic search relevance
Review API rate limits and plan batch operations accordingly
antiPatterns: Using overly broad or vague search queries that return unfocused results
Making rapid sequential API calls without respecting rate limits
Assuming semantic search returns exact keyword matches rather than conceptually similar content

faq.question: How do I get an Exa API key?
faq.answer: Visit the Exa website and create an account to obtain your API key. Free and paid tiers are available depending on your usage needs.

faq.question: What is the difference between semantic search and keyword search?
faq.answer: Semantic search uses AI embeddings to understand the meaning behind queries, finding conceptually similar content even without matching keywords. Keyword search only finds exact text matches.

faq.question: Can I search for specific types of content like research papers or companies?
faq.answer: Yes, Exa supports category filtering to search within specific content types including research papers, companies, people, and more.

faq.question: How are search results ranked?
faq.answer: Results are ranked by semantic similarity scores based on embedding distance. You can also sort by date or other metadata depending on the query type.

faq.question: What happens if I exceed my API rate limit?
faq.answer: Exa will return rate limit errors. The skill will surface these errors so you can retry after the rate limit window resets or upgrade your plan.

faq.question: Can this skill access my local files or private data?
faq.answer: No, this skill only interacts with the Exa API for public web content. It cannot access your local files or private databases unless you explicitly provide that content in your query.
